title: Playtime Track/Limit Plugin
description: This server plugin enables administrators to track and limit player playtime on the server.
body:
**Plugin Overview:**

The Playtime Track/Limit Plugin is a Minecraft server plugin that tracks and displays how long players have spent on the server and allows admins to limit the daily playtime amount. This plugin has been created in order to stop some from grinding when others have time constraints, evening the playing field among all players. It provides simple commands for players to check their own playtime and for admins to view global statistics. The plugin can be customized to display playtime in different formats and includes features for leaderboard tracking, rewards for milestones, and configurable messages. The Playtime Track/Limit Plugin makes it easy to monitor player activity and manage playtime data on your Minecraft server.

---

**How to Use Commands:**

- **Check your own playtime:**  
  Type `/playtime` or `/pt`  
  This shows your playtime for today and your total playtime on the server.

- **Check another player's playtime:**  
  Type `/playtime <player>` or `/pt <player>`  
  Replace `<player>` with the username you want to check.

- **Set the daily playtime limit (admin only):**  
  Type `/playLimit set <minutes>` or `/pl set <minutes>`  
  Replace `<minutes>` with the number of minutes for the daily playtime limit.  
  Setting this to `0` disables the limit.  

---

**Notes:**

- If you reach your daily playtime limit, you will be automatically kicked from the server with a message.
- Playtime is reset daily at midnight server time.
- Only players can use `/playtime` on themselves. Console and command blocks cannot use it for themselves.
